codeReview.summary: Verification-only feature that also fixed 5 missing type hints discovered during verification. All 5 VAL-CROSS assertions independently confirmed: 257/257 tests pass (VAL-CROSS-001), llama3.3:70b default present in distill.py/mcp_server.py/web.py (VAL-CROSS-002), DEFAULT_MODEL='all-MiniLM-L6-v2' in embed.py line 22 (VAL-CROSS-003), all 9 new mission functions have complete type hints on params and return types (VAL-CROSS-004), all 5 source files parse via AST without errors (VAL-CROSS-005). The commit adds 'Any' to typing imports and annotates return types for _get_dedup_model, _compute_embedding, _load_existing_fact_embeddings (distill.py), get_model (embed.py), and query_vec param for search_facts_semantic (memory_db.py). Changes are minimal, correct, and non-breaking.

issues.description: _get_dedup_model return type is 'Any' rather than a more specific type. Acceptable since SentenceTransformer is lazily imported and may not be available at import time.
_compute_embedding return type is 'Any' rather than 'np.ndarray'. Acceptable since numpy is lazily imported inside the function.
_load_existing_fact_embeddings return type 'tuple[list[dict], Any]' — the Any for the numpy array is acceptable given lazy imports, but the tuple type hint is precise about structure which is good.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly noted that the memory-worker skill's 'write tests first (TDD)' instruction doesn't apply to verification-only features. The skill could benefit from a note about verification features being an exception to TDD.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'The memory-worker skill says write tests first (TDD) which doesn't apply to verification-only features — could add a note about verification features being an exception'

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature described as 'verification-only — no new code' but worker needed to add type hint fixes (commit 4f172a2, 8 insertions/8 deletions across 3 files). This suggests that cross-cutting verification features may legitimately need to make small fixes. AGENTS.md already documents 'Type hints on all new functions' as a convention, which is what the worker enforced.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature description says 'no new code, just confirming invariants' but commit 4f172a2 modifies 3 files to add missing type hints that were required by VAL-CROSS-004.

summary: All 5 VAL-CROSS assertions independently verified and passing. The worker correctly identified 5 new functions missing type hints and fixed them before finalizing. The commit (4f172a2) is minimal and correct — only adds typing.Any imports and return/parameter annotations. All 257 tests pass, default models are unchanged, all source files parse cleanly. Pass.
